curation_notes: Patch modifies only one non-test source file (src/cryptography/hazmat/backends/openssl/backend.py). The fix adds a null check for p7.d.sign before accessing p7.d.sign.cert in the _load_pkcs7_certificates function. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern. Pre-assigned class null-deref (CWE-476) is correct — the advisory explicitly describes a NULL-pointer dereference and segfault.
